name: announcement-banner
description: Clean announcement template for changelogs, events, and launches.

embeds.title: What's new
embeds.description: Use this as a starter for launches, patch notes, or event announcements.

fields.name: Feature
fields.value: Write a short summary of the change here.

fields.name: Impact
fields.value: Explain what members should do next.

fields.name: Timing
fields.value: Add the rollout time or event date.

fields.name: Links
fields.value: Point to docs, threads, or a ticket channel.
